title: rubus × albigensis
intro: Rubus × albigensis, a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, is a cross between the wild strawberry (Fragaria vesca) and the raspberry (Rubus idaeus), resulting in a plant with characteristics of both parent species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus × albigensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
